case_title: OCON, MARIO vs. BRACERO, BIENVENIDO (AKA BENNY) IND/DBA

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRACERO, BIENVENIDO (AKA BENNY) IND/DBA TRANSPORTATION COORDINATORS OF AMERICA $2,116.77 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,199.77

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF OCON, MARIO AS TO DEFENDANT BRACERO, BIENVENIDO (AKA BENNY) IND/DBA TRANSPORTATION COORDINATORS OF AMERICA
